---
title: "GNSBI Boundaries"
autogen: true
format:
  html:
    grid:
      sidebar-width: 250px
      body-width: 1500px
      margin-width: 0px
      gutter-width: 1.5rem
---

GNSBI boundary.

::: {layout="[ [1] ]"}

```{=html}
<iframe style="border:none;" height="800" width="100%" src="https://viewer.openearth.nl/compendium-greater-north-sea-embedded/?folders=LaL1TbV4SFGhn15RgGj6qQ&layers=CwPagPP9RvSms-iV9o5tww&layerNames=GNSBI%20boundary"></iframe>
```

:::
